sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65031" key="marileuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰρῑλ-ευτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n65031.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">charcoal-burner</tr_>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰρῑλ-εύω</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burn charcoal</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
